artPrompt: A goblin caught mid-shout atop an overturned crate, mouth flung wide, fists pumping, a burst of flame-orange wash and confetti erupting from the cry up the wide frame against night-black smoke. A bonfire roars behind in the feral square, sparks streaking. All explosive vocal gesture, the slogan implied by the force of the bellow. Gleeful anarchic mayhem, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Shout a Campaign Slogan
text:
As you cast this, invent a campaign slogan on the spot and shout it at the table. It must rhyme. It must mention either snacks, fire, or yourself.
If the table cheers (any cheer counts, you are easily pleased), Shout a Campaign Slogan deals 3 damage to any target and you create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token named Volunteer.
If nobody cheers, the silence is its own punishment. Draw a card to cope.
flavorText: "A chicken in every pot, a goblin in every spot!"
